calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-06-2008 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-06-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: CHARLES RAMSEY FOR PLAINTIFF PRINCE HALL APARTMENTS
PROPERTY MANAGER TAMIKA JACKSON ALSO PRESENT
JONATHAN BUTLER FOR DEFENDANT KIMBERLY GRIZZELL

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. CASE SETTLED. TRIAL DATE OFF CALENDAR. TERMS OF SETTLEMENT PLACED ON RECORD: DEFENDANT DOES NOT HAVE TO RECERTIFY; NO OBLIGATION TO PAY BACK RENT; NO FUTURE RENT DUE; DEFENDANT TO VACATE PREMISES AT 1291 GOLDEN GATE #609, SF, 94115 ON OR BEFORE 6/30/08, 5PM; UPON VACATING, PLIANTIFF TO PAY DEFENDANT $100.; DEFENDANT WAIVES RETURN OF SECURITY DEPOSIT; DEFENDANT TO MEET WITH MAINTENANCE SUPERVISOR ON 3/19/08 FOR INSPECTION; IF DEFENDANT VACATES BY 6/30/08, PLAINTIFF SHALL FILE DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE WITHIN 5 DAYS.
IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO VACATE, PLAINTIFF TO FILE EXPARTE APPLICATION, WITH 48 HOUR NOTICE BY PHONE, FOR JUDGMENT FOR POSSESSION AND BACK RENT IN THE SUM OF $300.
NO APPEALS OR FURTHER STAYS. BOTH PARITES VOIR DIRED BY JUDGE AND AGREE TO TERMS.

JUDGE PRO TEM:TOM DROHAN; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE(218)
